modules.sql: WITH latest_customers AS (SELECT id, COALESCE(first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(last_name, '') AS last_name FROM (SELECT id, first_name, last_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY ifw_effective_date DESC) AS rn FROM customers) WHERE rn = 1) SELECT wt.wire_id, CAST(wt.customer_id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(lc.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(lc.last_name, '') AS last_name, wt.direction, ROUND(wt.amount, 2) AS amount, wt.counterparty_name, wt.status, wt.ifw_effective_date FROM wire_transfers wt LEFT JOIN latest_customers lc ON CAST(wt.customer_id AS INTEGER) = lc.id WHERE wt.amount > 10000
